overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a cinematic action game showing a character with a bow running along a stormy beach at night. The character approaches a large vegetated cliff face with dramatic teal lighting and atmospheric storm clouds.

agents.ego_description: running steadily along the beach with ocean waves to the left and a large vegetated cliff to the right

entered.detail: dark ocean waves crashing along the shoreline under stormy skies
tall rock face covered in hanging vegetation and vines rising from the beach
dark turbulent clouds with teal lighting creating a dramatic atmosphere
wet sand reflecting the teal light along the shoreline

segments.scene_description: The character runs along an open beach at night during a storm, with dark ocean waves on the left and a massive vegetated cliff face on the right. The scene is illuminated by dramatic teal light filtering through storm clouds.

events.description: moving from open beach into the shadow of the cliff overhang
approaching a dark rock formation or object at the base of the cliff

agents.ego_description: slowing down while approaching a dark silhouette on the sand near the cliff wall

notable_agents.action: player character with bow and tribal outfit running along the shoreline

entered.detail: rocky overhang extending from the cliff face creating shadow on the beach
large dark silhouette on the sand at the cliff base

segments.scene_description: The character moves under the cliff overhang where the sky becomes mostly blocked, approaching a dark rock formation on the sand. The vegetation on the cliff is now much closer and more detailed, and the ocean is partially occluded by the character's position.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a stormy beach that transitions from an open coastline into the sheltered shadow of a massive cliff. It begins with the character running beside dark ocean waves under a sky filled with storm clouds and dramatic teal light. As the character advances, the camera draws closer to the towering vegetated cliff face, causing the open horizon to narrow. The scene then shifts as the character moves beneath a heavy cliff overhang, where the sky is mostly blocked and the ocean is occluded. Finally, the perspective closes in on a dark rock formation on the sand, bringing the intricate details of the cliff's vegetation into sharp focus.
